meaning: adj.开始的,创始的,入会的,入社的,导引入门的,启蒙的
examples: Initiatory textbooks are important vehicles of traditional culture.
The result is to produce the initiatory distribution of information elements.
There are two main functions of the pyramid in relation to the initiatory procedures.
Carpenters who are members of trade guilds recognize the scribing tradition as having a symbolic and initiatory meaning that remains a secret.
